name: obsidian-agent-skills
description: Obsidian-backed workflow skills for project memory, task closeout, ADRs, and reusable lessons.

interface.shortDescription: Initialize project memory, close out tasks, and extract reusable Obsidian lessons
interface.longDescription: Use Obsidian Agent Skills to initialize Obsidian-backed agent project conventions with obinit, record project architecture decisions with obadr, close out task state with obclose, and extract reusable project lessons into Obsidian knowledge notes with oblearn.
defaultPrompt: 使用 $obinit 初始化当前项目。
使用 $obadr 为当前项目记录一个架构决策。
使用 $obclose 更新当前项目的任务状态和 memory。
使用 $oblearn 从当前项目提取可复用公共知识。
